title: Using the new Civil Service Jobs for candidates
body: "Civil Service Jobs is changing  The new Civil Service Jobs search is now in private beta. It’s still being tested and improved but you will be able to try:   searching for jobs setting up alerts creating an account   You will be able to change back to the current service at any time.  While we are running the current and new service at the same time, there may be some issues on the new service:   Job adverts may be missing attachments or have content in a different place place. Job adverts may sometimes appear twice in the job search. If you set up job alerts in the current and new service, you’ll receive emails for both.   Give us feedback on the new service using our feedback form.  More help  Use our support form if:   you are having technical issues with Civil Service Jobs you want to ask question about a job you want to give feedback about Civil Service Jobs  "
